commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a dispatcher-level trusted-sender fallback for canonical channel-management actions, adds Discord moderation actions to the trusted-sender set, and updates focused security tests.

PR surface: Source +45, Tests +70. Total +115 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: a message.action request can include requesterSenderId without toolContext, the gateway forwards it, the PR fallback does not require trust in that case, and Discord moderation forwards it as senderUserId. I did not execute it because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This needs human security review plus contributor real behavior proof; automation should not proceed while the trusted-sender boundary and proof gate are unresolved.
